name: Kate Connelly, RoyCooper.com
subject: the latest

body:
I wanted to give you an update on where things stand, friends. As you may have heard, Governor McCrory is refusing to concede and his campaign is actively trying to undermine the result
I wanted to give you an update on where things stand, friends. As you may have heard, Governor McCrory is refusing to concede and his campaign is actively trying to undermine the results of this election.
|
[](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202ad5/2fde7c66/43b59a9d/15693573/2786280398/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cooper-protectthiswin?utm_campaign=fnd_protec_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&refcode=em16_161115_fnd_gq_protec_ful_kc&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")
---
I wanted to give you an update on where things stand, friends. One week ago, North Carolinians elected Roy Cooper as our next governor. As you may have heard, Governor McCrory is refusing to concede and his campaign is actively trying to undermine the results of this election. Yesterday, as absentee ballot counting continued, our margin of victory grew even wider. **We're in a strong position, friends, but we can't let our guard down. Will you chip today to help us protect Roy's win?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**$5 »**](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202ad5/2fde7c66/43b59a9d/15693572/2786280398/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dZWE5ySUgxOSI6IjUifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cooper-protectthiswin?utm_campaign=fnd_protec_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&refcode=em16_161115_fnd_gq_protec_ful_kc&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&express_lane=true&amount=5")

---
With every day that goes by, we are more confident that Roy's election night victory will be confirmed after the final vote canvass on Friday.
We hope that Governor McCrory will respect the will of the voters and the integrity of our election process -- which has been overseen by a Republican-controlled Board of Elections.
**[We have to remain vigilant, though. We are doing everything possible to protect Roy's victory. Chip in today to help out.](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202ad5/2fde7c66/43b59a9d/15693573/2786280398/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cooper-protectthiswin?utm_campaign=fnd_protec_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&refcode=em16_161115_fnd_gq_protec_ful_kc&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")**
Thanks for your support,
Kate Connelly
Finance Director
Cooper for North Carolina

name: Jessica O'Connell, EMILY's List
subject: A note for Hillary
body:
| [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c75b5/24c69fd9/58094b1/18ec7c9d/680996965/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WPENEW25N_digital_email_20161115_HillaryTY_n-all&source=WPENEW25N_digital_email_20161115_HillaryTY_n-all")
---

Hi there,

As we all continue to process last week's loss, I wanted to share a few thoughts with you.

At EMILY's List we always say that the bravest thing our candidates do is put their name on the ballot. Hillary Clinton put her name on the ballot -- right at the very top.

She ran a campaign inspired by love, kindness, and community; one that valued and uplifted diverse perspectives from across the country. That's something we can all be proud of, regardless of the outcome.

Hillary may not be our first woman president, but I can guarantee you that she inspired the woman who will be first -- and when she runs, her path will be that much easier.

The EMILY's List community is sending a card to Hillary thanking her for all she did in this election.

**Join me in adding your name (and a short note if you'd like) to tell her why you're grateful that she ran:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Thank-You-Hillary](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c75b5/24c69fd9/58094b1/18ec7c9e/680996965/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/s/20161110_email_HillaryTY?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgThankYouHillary&utm_campaign=WPENEW25N_digital_email_20161115_HillaryTY_n-all&source=WPENEW25N_digital_email_20161115_HillaryTY_n-all")**

Jess O'Connell
Executive Director, EMILY's List

[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c75b5/24c69fd9/58094b1/18ec7c9f/680996965/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3&utm_campaign=WPENEW25N_digital_email_20161115_HillaryTY_n-all&source=WPENEW25N_digital_email_20161115_HillaryTY_n-all")

|
# EMILY's List is a community of over three million members that helps elect pro-choice Democratic women to office.
---

|
---
Paid for by EMILY's List [www.emilyslist.org](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c75b5/24c69fd9/58094b1/18ec7c98/680996965/VEsC/ "http://www.emilyslist.org/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4+-+wwwemilyslistorg&utm_campaign=WPENEW25N_digital_email_20161115_HillaryTY_n-all&source=WPENEW25N_digital_email_20161115_HillaryTY_n-all") and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
1800 M Street NW, Suite 375N, Washington, DC 20036 Thank you for being a supporter of EMILY's List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? Sign up to get less email [here](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c75b5/24c69fd9/58094b1/18ec7c99/680996965/VEsD/ "http://action.emilyslist.org/page/s/less-email-private-bc?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=5+-+here&utm_campaign=WPENEW25N_digital_email_20161115_HillaryTY_n-all&source=WPENEW25N_digital_email_20161115_HillaryTY_n-all"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you want to stop receiving all email, unsubscribe [here](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c75b5/24c69fd9/58094b1/18ec7c9a/680996965/VEsA/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=WPENEW25N_digital_email_20161115_HillaryTY_n-all&source=WPENEW25N_digital_email_20161115_HillaryTY_n-all"). Have a question? Feel free to drop us a line at [information@emilyslist.org](mailto:information@emilyslist.org) or simply reply to this email.

name: OurRevolution.com
subject: TONIGHT: Major speech by Bernie Sanders
body:
We can and will bring about the change we need in our country.
#
Sisters and Brothers,
Bernie Sanders is going to give a major speech on Wednesday night about the future of our country under the presidency of Donald Trump.
This is something you'll want to watch. **[Will you RSVP to say you'll watch Bernie's speech? We'll send you a link to watch online before the speech starts at 7pm ET.](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/bernie-speech?source=em161116 "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/bernie-speech?source=em161116")**
**[RSVP TO WATCH
BERNIE'S SPEECH »](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/bernie-speech?source=em161116 "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/bernie-speech?source=em161116")**
At this moment, we need to come together and forge a path ahead. We need to do all we can to protect the most vulnerable people in our country from Donald Trump's administration. Please make sure to watch Bernie's speech tonight to find out how best to continue our political revolution.
In solidarity,
Shannon Jackson
Executive Director
Our Revolution

PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
603 2ND ST, NE
WASHINGTON, DC, 20002

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution's general mission and are not designated for any specific activity.
603 2nd St NE, Washington, DC 20002
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/").

name: Trey Nix, RoyCooper.com
subject: Facts
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
Governor McCrory's lawyers are making any claim they can to drag this thing out. We can't let them steal this election.
Governor McCrory's lawyers are making any claim they can to drag this thing out. We can't let them steal this election.
|
[](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202adc/2fde7c66/43b16b92/156936a5/4228250673/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cooper-protectthiswin?utm_campaign=fnd_protec_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&refcode=em16_161116_fnd_gq_protec_ful_tn&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")
---
Friends, Over the next few days, you're going to hear a lot of noise coming from the other side trying to undermine the results of an election they lost. Here's an important fact to keep in mind: Roy Cooper has more votes than Governor McCrory and his lead is getting bigger. **Governor McCrory's lawyers are making any claim they can to drag this thing out. We can't let them steal this election. Chip in today to help us fight:** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**$5 »**](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202adc/2fde7c66/43b16b92/156936a4/4228250673/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dZWE5ySUgxOSI6IjUifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cooper-protectthiswin?utm_campaign=fnd_protec_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&refcode=em16_161116_fnd_gq_protec_ful_tn&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&express_lane=true&amount=5")

---
The people of North Carolina have spoken. With each day that passes, we are more confident that this win will be certified and Roy will be the 75th governor of North Carolina.
We said we were going to make history on Election Day -- and we did. Let's make sure it stays that way.
**[Chip in today to help us protect this win.](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202adc/2fde7c66/43b16b92/156936a5/4228250673/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cooper-protectthiswin?utm_campaign=fnd_protec_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&refcode=em16_161116_fnd_gq_protec_ful_tn&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")**
Thanks for the support,
Trey Nix
Campaign Manager
Cooper for North Carolina

clean_body: Governor McCrory's lawyers are making any claim they can to drag this thing out. We can't let them steal this election. Governor McCrory's lawyers are making any claim they can to drag this thing out. We can't let them steal this election. | "" Friends, Over the next few days, you're going to hear a lot of noise coming from the other side trying to undermine the results of an election they lost. Here's an important fact to keep in mind: Roy Cooper has more votes than Governor McCrory and his lead is getting bigger. Governor McCrory's lawyers are making any claim they can to drag this thing out. We can't let them steal this election. Chip in today to help us fight: If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | "" | | "" | "" | | "" The people of North Carolina have spoken. With each day that passes, we are more confident that this win will be certified and Roy will be the 75th governor of North Carolina. We said we were going to make history on Election Day -- and we did. Let's make sure it stays that way. "" Thanks for the support, Trey Nix Campaign Manager Cooper for North Carolina | "" * Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina Roy Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 10587 Raleigh NC 27605 United States

name: Chairman Jennifer Horn
subject: Let's Celebrate!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Hampshire Republican State Committee
body:
| |
---
---
| Friend,
It is a GREAT time to be a Republican in the Granite State!
Last week we enjoyed sweeping victories across the State! Not only did we maintain our majorities in the State House, State Senate, and Executive Council we also, for the first time in 14 years, won the corner office!
_This victory belongs to every single one of us_.
Please join us on December 7th in Manchester as we celebrate with special guest Governor-Elect Chris Sununu!
[Click the invitation below to purchase your tickets to help us celebrate!](http://email.robly.com/wf/click?upn=3qP3xl6Iy86fMdiFlFopyAONS6Aib8p9E2AIkD9i2eqyUS-2BnOz6PXnItmWNZjiIC_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFb47pW8iDRAYLsM9sf9wIa92fG-2FsxU68zXzzMA2nO2VCunl2bm-2FhLXsWS8P3XITs28GUU7Mnlu37POPaWv9myv4YWBbFU9plZi0-2B42tZfBaUujH4mxA3e6jOiyDa5q6HKz45-2B17g6DUNL-2BnIMAR30MVBb9QHnAR-2FzQ6AOoVCRJanC7Qx7VQ4xyvB-2FyFgsRk4qay6ny0mpArxFb3JBWb-2BSbLdqBdNF8IuBWJkB3f3kDjyT0YwywuTNaQGy5OLqUXxApD3EOZl-2Fr7WHnChAERClNdri8W-2BbXmni3wO-2B6j7cDL5iaCtg1sQuNpz72cUUBKdqPpdwrmJLO3eYeY5WhR81jwGY-2FTNX8wmgsQS3WkDCREpmWNtPSlNCjvU0wLbbQbpX47Voc1-2FeUsOV4-2FBneFwwFJzFbFespv17jjfBNBQ9iow-3D-3D) |

Not only did we maintain our majorities in the State House, State Senate, and Executive Council we also, for the first time in 14 years, won the corner office! This victory belongs to every single one of us. Please join us on December 7th in Manchester as we celebrate with special guest Governor-Elect Chris Sununu! | | Additional speakers and program to be announced. Sincerely, | | Jennifer Horn Chairman | | | Paid for by the New Hampshire Republican State Committee Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. | This email was sent to mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com Republican Party of New Hampshire · 10 Water Street · Concord · New Hampshire · 03301

name: Jessica O'Connell, EMILY's List
subject: How will you do the most good?
body:
| [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c759a/24c69fd9/45700a0/18ec765f/3848910839/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WPENEW28N_digital_email_20161116_FiredUp_n-all&source=WPENEW28N_digital_email_20161116_FiredUp_n-all")
---

Peter,

It's been a tough week.

I've been watching our staff and the rest of this community work through their sorrow, and I'm so glad to see so many people starting to think about how we fight back.

We know the fights to come won't be easy. And we know we will have to face them together as a progressive movement, even when the odds are long and the naysayers tell us to give up.

Hillary taught us her Methodist creed to do all the good you can, for all the people you can, in all the ways you can, as long as ever you can. And in the coming years, we're going to do just that.

For some that may mean running for office. For others it may involve donating to a cause you care about, volunteering with a campaign, or organizing your community. There are many ways to have a positive impact.

**We're ready to take the next steps to make sure women and families are a priority for this country. Let us know how you plan to do the most good you can:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Do-the-Most-Good](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c759a/24c69fd9/45700a0/18ec7658/3848910839/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/s/20161116_email_FiredUp?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgDotheMostGood&utm_campaign=WPENEW28N_digital_email_20161116_FiredUp_n-all&source=WPENEW28N_digital_email_20161116_FiredUp_n-all")**

Thank you,

Jess O'Connell
Executive Director, EMILY's List

[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c759a/24c69fd9/45700a0/18ec7659/3848910839/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20161116_email_FiredUp-upsell?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3&utm_campaign=WPENEW28N_digital_email_20161116_FiredUp_n-all&source=WPENEW28N_digital_email_20161116_FiredUp_n-all")

|
# EMILY's List is a community of over three million members that helps elect pro-choice Democratic women to office.
---

|
---
Paid for by EMILY's List [www.emilyslist.org](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c759a/24c69fd9/45700a0/18ec765a/3848910839/VEsC/ "http://www.emilyslist.org/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4+-+wwwemilyslistorg&utm_campaign=WPENEW28N_digital_email_20161116_FiredUp_n-all&source=WPENEW28N_digital_email_20161116_FiredUp_n-all") and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
1800 M Street NW, Suite 375N, Washington, DC 20036 Thank you for being a supporter of EMILY's List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? Sign up to get less email [here](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c759a/24c69fd9/45700a0/18ec765b/3848910839/VEsD/ "http://action.emilyslist.org/page/s/less-email-private-bc?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=5+-+here&utm_campaign=WPENEW28N_digital_email_20161116_FiredUp_n-all&source=WPENEW28N_digital_email_20161116_FiredUp_n-all"). Have a question? Feel free to drop us a line at [information@emilyslist.org](mailto:information@emilyslist.org) or simply reply to this email.

Contributions or gifts to EMILY's List or endorsed candidates are not tax deductible.

name: OurRevolution.com
subject: WATCH: Bernie's speech at 7pm ET / 4pm PT
body:
We can and will bring about the change we need in our country.
#
Sisters and Brothers -
This evening Bernie Sanders will give a live video address about the future of our country under a Trump administration.
**Bernie's speech will begin at 7pm ET / 4pm PT.[You can tune in to the livestream here:](https://ourrevolution.com/watch "https://ourrevolution.com/watch")**
**[WATCH BERNIE'S SPEECH»](https://ourrevolution.com/watch "https://ourrevolution.com/watch")**
It is now more important than ever that we move forward together to defend social, racial, economic and environmental justice. As we face the uncertainty of what a Trump presidency might entail, we must do everything we can to advance the ideals of our political revolution.
We hope you'll tune in to Bernie's speech tonight to learn what's next for our movement.
In solidarity,
Team Bernie

PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
603 2ND ST, NE
WASHINGTON, DC, 20002

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution's general mission and are not designated for any specific activity.
603 2nd St NE, Washington, DC 20002
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/").
clean_body: We can and will bring about the change we need in our country. Sisters and Brothers - This evening Bernie Sanders will give a live video address about the future of our country under a Trump administration. Bernie's speech will begin at 7pm ET / 4pm PT. "" "" It is now more important than ever that we move forward together to defend social, racial, economic and environmental justice. As we face the uncertainty of what a Trump presidency might entail, we must do everything we can to advance the ideals of our political revolution. We hope you'll tune in to Bernie's speech tonight to learn what's next for our movement. In solidarity, Team Bernie PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION 603 2ND ST, NE WASHINGTON, DC, 20002 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution's general mission and are not designated for any specific activity. 603 2nd St NE, Washington, DC 20002

name: SURVEY (via DSCC)
subject: your thoughts on the election:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
We want to hear directly from you on how to move our party forward. Please take a moment to share your feedback with us. [](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954efb8/2b07114c/42dba75b/734a209c/1652438935/VEsH/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/member-survey")
---
| [](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954efb8/2b07114c/42dba75b/734a209c/1652438935/VEsE/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/member-survey")
---
Friend, our party is at a turning point and we need your input immediately to map our path forward.

Every inch of progress we made these past eight years, from marriage equality and affordable healthcare to critical action on climate change, hinges on how Democrats across the country respond to the GOP's threats.

[**So as we gear up for the fight ahead, we need to hear directly from you, Friend. Will you take a moment to complete our Official DSCC membership survey and share your thoughts?**](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954efb8/2b07114c/42dba75b/734a209c/1652438935/VEsF/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/member-survey")

Your answers will be shared with Democratic leaders to help inform critical party decisions, and you will help the DSCC set priorities for the months and years ahead.

[**Please join Democrats from across the country in sharing your insights >>**](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954efb8/2b07114c/42dba75b/734a209c/1652438935/VEsC/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/member-survey")

We appreciate your input, unwavering dedication, and willingness to fight for change you wish to see in our country.

Thank you,
Team DSCC

A quick note on donations, Friend:

We're hard at work readying resources for the fight ahead -- and with 99% of our contributions coming from grassroots Democrats giving under $200, your support could not be more important to our efforts.

Please consider a contribution of any amount today. We can elect a Senate that will protect our values from right-wing extremists, but only if supporters like you have our back.

[**Contribute**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccsurvey?refcode=DPE-20161116-SurveyDS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954efb8/2b07114c/42dba75b/734a209e/1652438935/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954efb8/2b07114c/42dba75b/734a2099/1652438935/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954efb8/2b07114c/42dba75b/734a2098/1652438935/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.
